name: kinesica-site
description: Static site tooling (CSS purge audit, scripts)

scripts.build:seo: npm run seo:schema && npm run schema:partials && npm run assets:build
scripts.build:pathologies: node scripts/sync-pathology-header-labels.mjs && node scripts/build-pathology-pages.mjs && node scripts/inject-local-schema.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && node scripts/verify-pathology-pages.mjs && npm run assets:build
scripts.migrate:cta: node scripts/migrate-cta-strip.mjs && node scripts/normalize-cta-strip.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && npm run assets:build
